title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Gwalior team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises:
Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kalyan Jewellers International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
